'''thanulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabosy|kabosy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabosy|kabosy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thanulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thænilith|thænilith]] || [[word:thænilij|thænilij]] || [[word:thænilish|thænilish]] || [[word:thænili|thænili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thanunuluth|thanunuluth]] || [[word:thanunuluj|thanunuluj]] || [[word:thanunulush|thanunulush]] || [[word:thanunulu|thanunulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanuluth|thanuluth]] || [[word:thanuluj|thanuluj]] || [[word:thanulush|thanulush]] || [[word:thanulu|thanulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanufluth|thanufluth]] || [[word:thanufluj|thanufluj]] || [[word:thanuflush|thanuflush]] || [[word:thanufluf|thanufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thanuluthu|thanuluthu]] || [[word:thanuluju|thanuluju]] || [[word:thanulushu|thanulushu]] || [[word:thanuluku|thanuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thanuluth|thanuluth]] || [[word:thanuluj|thanuluj]] || [[word:thanulush|thanulush]] || [[word:thanulu|thanulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thanuluthul|thanuluthul]] || [[word:thanulujul|thanulujul]] || [[word:thanulushul|thanulushul]] || [[word:thanulukul|thanulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thanuluthuthu|thanuluthuthu]] || [[word:thanulujuju|thanulujuju]] || [[word:thanulushushu|thanulushushu]] || [[word:thanuluku|thanuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thanuluthun|thanuluthun]] || [[word:thanulujun|thanulujun]] || [[word:thanulushun|thanulushun]] || [[word:thanulukun|thanulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thanuluthuoro|thanuluthuoro]] || [[word:thanulujuoro|thanulujuoro]] || [[word:thanulushuoro|thanulushuoro]] || [[word:thanulukuoro|thanulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
